1) INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.223-99, "ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS".
ALL OTHER CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL EFFECT.

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.departmentName: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO:
1) INCREASE THE MULTIPLE AWARD CONSTRUCTION CEILING FROM $2,000,000,000.00 TO $2,500,000,000.00.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL EFFECT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
